title: Thai Tandoori Soup
description: A flavorful and spicy Thai-inspired soup featuring tandoori chicken and a variety of vegetables.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the tandoori spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and cook for 10-15 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
